lectures.t: Status of farm mechanization in India; power availability on farms and trends in mechanization

Equipment for fertilizer application and inter-cultivation
Equipment for plant protection
Equipment for harvesting, threshing, mowing, chaff cutting and baling
Special equipment for crops: vegetables, sugarcane, cotton, groundnut, potato and fruit crops
Equipment for orchard and plantation crops: coconut, areca nut, cashew nut
Design and selection of machinery elements: gears, pulleys, chains and sprockets, belts
Design of bearings, couplings, springs and fasteners
Farm machine system characteristics and evaluation
Dynamic balancing and stability of farm machines
Force analysis on agricultural tools and implements: pull, draft, unit draft and power of farm equipment
Design of soil working tools for sowing and planting
Design of fertilizer applicators and inter-cultivation equipment
Design of harvesters and threshers
Pneumatic and hydraulic controls
Machine learning, IoT, robotics and mechatronics in farm machinery
Construction and operation of farm equipment
Selection and operation of drones

courses.title: Farm Machinery Testing, Evaluation and Management

Cost analysis of animal and tractor operated implements and tractors

Standards and their formulation: organizations, standardization of farm equipment, measurement of specifications
Engineering thermodynamics, power cycles and fuels
Various systems of IC engines: operation, adjustment and troubleshooting
Calculations of power, torque, speed; firing arrangement and intervals
Heat load and power transmission from piston to the flywheel
Tractor power transmission: clutch, gearbox, differential and final drives
Power outlets: P.T.O. and drawbar
Recent trends in tractor design; emissions and control of pollutants
Mechanical and power steering
Tractor chassis mechanics and hitching systems
Hydraulic controls for tractors; automatic position and draft control

Operation and maintenance of tractors and power tillers
Anthropometry in equipment design

Fatigue and comfort

Safety aspects of agricultural machinery

Chemical hazards and control measures
Operator's protective gadgets
Design of tractor controls: hand and foot controls
Visual range and limitations; seat design

courses.title: Soil Dynamics in Tillage and Traction

Solar radiation: measurement and characteristics of the solar spectrum
Solar energy collection for thermal and PV application and its storage
Solar photovoltaic conversion and SPV powered systems
Types of wind mills and their applications

Chemical conversion processes: carbonization, briquetting, pelletization and densification of biomass
Bioconversion into alcohols, methyl and ethyl esters, organic acids
Types of biogas plants; biogas properties, uses and distribution
Alternate fuels for IC engines
Energy requirement in agricultural production systems; energy ratio and specific energy value
Inflow and outflow of energy in unit agricultural operations; energy audit, accounting and analysis

Workshop practices applied in prototype production
Common tools and press operations
Metal cutting and machining; jigs, fixtures and gauges
